_publications._publicationTitle: Using antisense oligonucleotides for the physiological modulation of the alternative splicing of NF1 exon 23a during PC12 neuronal differentiation.

_contextSnippet: In addition, during differentiation there is a partial switch in Nf1 isoforms from type II transcripts (E23a included) to the expression of type I transcripts (E23a excluded)
details: During differentiation there is a partial switch in Nf1 isoforms from type II transcripts (E23a included) to the expression of type I transcripts (E23a excluded)
